name: node-unicode-canonical-property-names-ecmascript
title: node-unicode-canonical-property-names-ecmascript
summary: Unicode property names supported in ES RegExp in Node.js
description:
Unicode property names supported in ES RegExp in Node.js
This module provides the set of canonical Unicode property names supported
in ECMAScript RegExp property escapes.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
